---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is currently difficult or missing?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried any workarounds or alternatives?

## Additional context

Any other context, links, or examples that support this request.

> **Security note:** Do not include API keys, secrets, or credentials in this request.
